sourceMovie.title: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Black Panther: Wakanda Forever for the same reason it broke through in 2022: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a adventure rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Ryan Coogler keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Infinity War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Black Panther: Wakanda Forever clicked for you, Avengers: Infinity War (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Black Panther: Wakanda Forever?
faq.answer: Try Avengers: Infinity War, Avengers: Endgame, Captain America: Civil War—each shares DNA with Black Panther: Wakanda Forever while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Black Panther: Wakanda Forever?
faq.answer: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever (2022) is best described as Action, Adventure, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Black Panther: Wakanda Forever part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Black Panther Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
